names.japanese_name: パルミチン酸アスコルビル
names.japanese_label_name: パルミチン酸アスコルビル
aliases: Fatty acid esters of ascorbic acid

natural_occurrence.description: Fat-soluble form of vitamin C created by esterifying ascorbic acid with palmitic acid. Ester formed from naturally occurring ascorbic acid (vitamin C) and palmitic acid (found in palm oil, meat, dairy).

manufacturing.description: Produced by reaction of the primary alcohol group of ascorbic acid (vitamin C) with the carboxylic acid group of palmitic acid. Simple monoester with ascorbyl and palmitate moieties in 1:1 mole ratio. Molecular formula: C22H38O7.

eu.conditions: E304i (ascorbyl palmitate) and E304ii (ascorbyl stearate) evaluated together

usa.notes: FDA allows up to 0.02% by weight in margarine as optional preservative

japan.japanese_regulation_name: L-アスコルビル6-パルミタート

regulatory_history.event: EFSA re-evaluation confirms safe at reported uses and use levels

food_categories_eu.category_name: Foods for infants and young children

commonly_found_in: Infant formula (protects DHA and ARA from oxidation)

adi_context.source_note: Based on EFSA ADI of 1.1 mg/kg bw/day established in 2015. JECFA set a higher ADI of 0-25 mg/kg bw/day.

fun_facts.title: Fat-Soluble Vitamin C
fun_facts.description: Unlike regular vitamin C which is water-soluble, ascorbyl palmitate dissolves in fats and oils, allowing it to protect lipid-based products from oxidation.

fun_facts.title: Dual Identity
fun_facts.description: Functions both as a source of vitamin C (when consumed, it breaks down into vitamin C and palmitic acid) AND as a powerful fat-preserving antioxidant.

fun_facts.title: Margarine Guardian
fun_facts.description: FDA allows up to 0.02% by weight in margarine as an optional preservative, significantly extending shelf life by preventing rancidity.

fun_facts.title: Free Radical Fighter
fun_facts.description: Dissolves directly into lipid systems where it neutralizes free radicals and inhibits the oxidation chain reaction at its source - protecting fats from the inside out.

fun_facts.title: Baby Formula Protector
fun_facts.description: Essential in infant formula for protecting vulnerable polyunsaturated fats like DHA and ARA from oxidation, ensuring babies get their vital nutrients intact.
